headline: Carnell Tate doesn't run 'overvalued' 40 at Ohio State pro day
description: Receiver Carnell Tate elected Wednesday not to improve on his 40-yard dash time from the NFL combine, saying during Ohio State's pro day that it can be "overvalued."

headline: NFL draft: Ranking Ohio State first-round WRs since 2022
description: Tate could be the WR1 of the 2026 draft. But how does he compare to Garrett Wilson, Chris Olave, Jaxon Smith-Njigba, Marvin Harrison Jr. and Emeka Egbuka?

headline: NFL, sportsbooks among defendants in gambling addiction lawsuit
description: The NFL, its data partner Genius Sports, and sportsbooks FanDuel and DraftKings have been named as defendants in a gambling addiction lawsuit filed Tuesday in a Pennsylvania state court.

headline: What Eli Stowers offers prospective NFL teams
description: NFL draft prospect Eli Stowers tells Rich Eisen what he can bring to a prospective NFL team.

headline: Mel Kiper Jr.: Jeremiyah Love would be a tremendous fit for Commanders
description: Mel Kiper Jr. and Tim Hasselbeck weigh in on whether Jeremiyah Love should be a top-10 NFL draft pick.

headline: Why Mel Kiper Jr. sees a big gap between Mendoza and Simpson
description: Mel Kiper Jr. explains why he disagrees with the notion that Ty Simpson is closing the gap on Fernando Mendoza ahead of this year's NFL draft.

headline: 2026 NFL mock drafts: Latest ESPN player, team predictions
description: Here are our experts' NFL mock drafts for the 2026 cycle, including projected landing spots for all the top quarterbacks.

headline: 2026 NFL mock draft: Yates' pick predictions in Rounds 1-2
description: Field Yates unveils his latest NFL mock draft, projecting two full rounds. Which top prospects could go in the opening 64 picks?

headline: Where the Denver Broncos stand after early free agency
description: Except for one big trade, the Broncos have kept a low profile so far this offseason. Where does Denver's roster stand with the NFL draft on the horizon?
